description: Configure Redmine to track employee details by adding two new User custom fields and updating the administrator's profile. Create a User custom field named 'Department' using the List format with possible values: Engineering, Sales, Operations, and HR. This field must be required, searchable, and editable. Create a second User custom field named 'Employee ID' using the Text format with a regular expression of ^[A-Z]{2}-\d{4}$, a minimum and maximum length of 7, and set it to be visible. Update the 'admin' user profile by setting the Department to 'Engineering' and the Employee ID to 'AD-0001'.
